version.h(3) Library Functions Manual version.h(3)

NAME

version.h

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct semantic_version_t
Parsed semantic version structure.

Macros


#define ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_MAJOR 0
#define ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_MINOR 9
#define ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_PATCH 2
#define ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_STRING '0.9.2'
#define ASCII_CHAT_GIT_VERSION 'dev-177+gafc0edf5c-dirty'
#define ASCII_CHAT_GIT_COMMIT_HASH 'afc0edf5cf24e7f87dab9d7ff49e4eecafd8933e'
#define ASCII_CHAT_GIT_IS_DIRTY true
#define ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE 'Release'
#define ASCII_CHAT_OS 'Darwin'
#define ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE '2026-03-08'
#define ASCII_CHAT_REPO_HASH '110293d18725e44bfb4e3003a095e40286297243e3a0d480e55d5130a9946c7a'
#define ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL 'v' ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_STRING '-' ASCII_CHAT_GIT_VERSION
#define ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION_EMOJI_L '💻📸'
#define ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION_EMOJI_R '🔡💬'
#define ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION_TEXT 'Video chat in your terminal'
#define ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION_EMOJI_L ' ' ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION_TEXT ' ' ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION_EMOJI_R
#define ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_INFO_STRING 'ascii-chat ' ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL ' built on ' ASCII_CHAT_OS ' (' ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE ', ' ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE ')'
#define ASCII_CHAT_DOT_COMMENT_STRING ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_INFO_STRING '0 ASCII_CHAT_DESCRIPTION '0 'https://github.com/zfogg/ascii-chat'
#define ASCII_CHAT_DOT_ASCII_CHAT_STRING ASCII_CHAT_DOT_COMMENT_STRING '0 'coded with 🖤 by Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>'

Compare two semantic versions.

Function Documentation

const char * ascii_chat_get_build_info (void )

const char * ascii_chat_get_comment (void )

const char * ascii_chat_get_version (void )

int version_compare (semantic_version_t a, semantic_version_t b)

Compare two semantic versions.

Parameters

a First version
b Second version

Returns

-1 if a < b, 0 if a == b, 1 if a > b

Definition at line 112 of file version.c.

112                                                                 {
113   // Compare major version
114   if (a.major < b.major) {
115     return -1;
116   }
117   if (a.major > b.major) {
118     return 1;
119   }
120 
121   // Major versions equal, compare minor
122   if (a.minor < b.minor) {
123     return -1;
124   }
125   if (a.minor > b.minor) {
126     return 1;
127   }
128 
129   // Minor versions equal, compare patch
130   if (a.patch < b.patch) {
131     return -1;
132   }
133   if (a.patch > b.patch) {
134     return 1;
135   }
136 
137   // All components equal
138   return 0;
139 }




References b, semantic_version_t::major,
    semantic_version_t::minor, and semantic_version_t::patch.


Referenced by update_check_load_cache(), and
    update_check_perform().






semantic_version_t version_parse (const char *
  version_string)


Parse a version string into semantic version components. Handles
    both "v1.2.3" and "1.2.3" formats. Allows missing
    components (e.g., "1.2" = 1.2.0, "1" = 1.0.0).




Parameters


version_string Version string to parse (e.g.,
  "v0.8.1", "1.2.3")


Returns


Parsed semantic version (check .valid field for
  success)


Definition at line 49 of file version.c.


49                                                              {
50   semantic_version_t result = {0, 0, 0, false};
51 
52   if (!version_string || version_string[0] == '\0') {
53     return result;
54   }
55 
56   const char *p = version_string;
57 
58   // Optionally skip 'v' prefix if present
59   if (p[0] == 'v' || p[0] == 'V') {
60     p++; // Skip 'v'
61   }
62 
63   // Parse major version
64   char *endptr = NULL;
65   errno = 0; // Reset errno before strtol
66   long major = strtol(p, &endptr, 10);
67   if (errno == ERANGE || endptr == p || major < 0 || major > INT_MAX) {
68     return result; // Invalid major version or overflow
69   }
70   result.major = (int)major;
71   p = endptr;
72 
73   // Version must have all three components (major.minor.patch)
74   if (*p != '.') {
75     return result; // Invalid: missing minor version
76   }
77   p++; // Skip dot
78 
79   // Parse minor version
80   errno = 0; // Reset errno before strtol
81   long minor = strtol(p, &endptr, 10);
82   if (errno == ERANGE || endptr == p || minor < 0 || minor > INT_MAX) {
83     return result; // Invalid minor version or overflow
84   }
85   result.minor = (int)minor;
86   p = endptr;
87 
88   // Version must have patch component
89   if (*p != '.') {
90     return result; // Invalid: missing patch version
91   }
92   p++; // Skip dot
93 
94   // Parse patch version
95   errno = 0; // Reset errno before strtol
96   long patch = strtol(p, &endptr, 10);
97   if (errno == ERANGE || endptr == p || patch < 0 || patch > INT_MAX) {
98     return result; // Invalid patch version or overflow
99   }
100   result.patch = (int)patch;
101   p = endptr;
102 
103   // Reject prerelease tags (e.g., "v1.2.3-beta") - must end after patch number
104   if (*p != '\0') {
105     return result; // Invalid: has extra characters after version
106   }
107 
108   result.valid = true;
109   return result;
110 }






References ERANGE, errno,
    semantic_version_t::major, semantic_version_t::minor,
    semantic_version_t::patch, and semantic_version_t::valid.


Referenced by update_check_load_cache(), and
    update_check_perform().
